label: tpu-init-remediate-0320-v5
cmd:
remote_cmd=set -e
echo [occupancy-before]
pids=$(sudo lsof -t /dev/accel* /dev/vfio/* 2>/dev/null | sort -u || true)
if [ -n \"$pids\" ]; then ps -o pid=,user=,cmd= -p $pids; fi
echo [targeted-kill]
for p in $pids; do
  u=$(ps -o user= -p \"$p\" | xargs || true)
  if [ \"$u\" = \"jasm\" ]; then sudo kill \"$p\" || true; fi
done
sleep 1
echo [occupancy-after-kill]
sudo lsof -w /dev/accel* /dev/vfio/* 2>/dev/null | head -n 40 || true
echo [cleanup]
sudo rm -rf /tmp/*tpu* /tmp/tpu_logs/* 2>/dev/null || true
echo [retry]
timeout 240s python3 -c \"import jax; print(jax.__version__); print(jax.devices())\"; ./wiki_tpu/kimi_tpu.sh ssh kimi-tpu-auto-0320 --command ""
